title: EoE Third Time Return Retribution translation question
display_title: EoE Third Time Return Retribution translation question
wikitext:
[]: EoE Third Time/Return/Retribution translation question             Quote Post by JC Denton » Fri Jun 04, 2010 5:39 pm quick question about 26' my fansub (I guess) says: SEELE: "By using the incomplete soul of Evangelion Unit 01's pilot we'll complement the sould of humanity." Kiel: "It's the third time of the return." so does he really say THIRD time? like it's the third return to nothingness? (similar thing happens in matrix reloaded) I mean this script here for example http://www.evangelion-armageddon.com/Scripts/EOE2.html says something completely different... and this is very crucial information

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jun 04, 2010 5:45 pm It's the Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by JC Denton » Sat Jun 05, 2010 9:48 am of course it is but that doesn't answer my question

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jun 05, 2010 12:39 pm JC Denton wrote: of course it is but that doesn't answer my question

[]:             Quote Post by JC Denton » Sat Jun 05, 2010 1:14 pm I try to find out what Kiel actually said there since translation variants differ completely if it's "the third time of the return" - first and second impact didn't complement the sould of humanity, so what "third return"?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sat Jun 05, 2010 1:24 pm The third return of Adam to the world in General. Adam's third return shall smite the world as thou and thee now it dear Keel.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jun 05, 2010 1:39 pm JC Denton wrote: I try to find out what Kiel actually said there since translation variants differ completely if it's "the third time of the return" - first and second impact didn't complement the sould of humanity, so what "third return"?

[]:             Quote Post by JC Denton » Sat Jun 05, 2010 3:37 pm Dark doom wrote: The third return of Adam to the world in General.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jun 05, 2010 3:41 pm It's literally what it sounds like. Each Impact involves Adam, basically, showing up and causing a shitstorm on planet Earth.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Jun 05, 2010 3:44 pm Answer to the original question: the script is probably incorrect, and it should simply read something like "The moment of Third Impact has come". @Aura: Nope. First Impact was LILITH showing up and causing a shitstorm.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jun 05, 2010 11:30 pm I'm aware, but they arrived at generally the same show and characters in-universe have difficult time telling them apart.

[]:             Quote Post by JC Denton » Sun Jun 06, 2010 4:34 am Legendary wrote: Answer to the original question: the script is probably incorrect, and it should simply read something like "The moment of Third Impact has come". @Aura: Nope. First Impact was LILITH showing up and causing a shitstorm.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 06, 2010 5:38 am Reiterating some points but whatever, clarification's needed (Where's Reichu and the original Japanese script when I need it!) : Legendary wrote: The script is probably incorrect, and it should simply read something like "The moment of Third Impact has come".

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sun Jun 06, 2010 6:36 am AuraTwilight wrote: It's literally what it sounds like. Each Impact involves Adam, basically, showing up and causing a shitstorm on planet Earth.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Jun 06, 2010 1:42 pm Perhaps some Angels were all laid and ready to go and then they got shoved back into Adam when Lilith crash-landed?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 06, 2010 1:45 pm The Third Return/Retribution being "at hand" doesn't mean anybody's going to revert to LCL right away, it just means Third Impact is in the process of starting. Besides, we never see the Eva themselves turning into LCL (my guess is they're made of Particle-Wave-Matter like the Angels, but all the technical gobbledygook when it comes to Eva just isn't my forte) and Eva-01 may be Lilith's surrogate but she was probably still developed from Adam like the rest of the Eva.
summary: []: EoE Third Time/Return/Retribution translation question             Quote Post by JC Denton » Fri Jun 04, 2010 5:39 pm quick question about 26' my fansub (I guess) says: SEELE: "By using the incomplete soul of Evangelion Unit 01's pilot we'll complement the sould of humanity." Kiel: "It's the third time of the return." so does he really say THIRD time? like it's the third return to nothingn
